title: Employment of certified commercial applicators by school systems
doc_html:
§3387.  Employment of certified commercial applicators by school systems

A.  School systems having ten or more schools shall employ at least two certified commercial applicators.

B.  School systems having less than ten schools shall employ at least one certified commercial applicator.

Acts 1995, No. 237, §1.
